name: player_team success rate from plays range year_offset pools numerator/denominator
description: Player variant: the _player_team_stats CTE is pid-keyed via the player_gamelogs/nfl_games join, so a multi-year year_offset range projects year+week onto the base play-by-play CTE (else the join references columns the off-only GROUP BY never emitted) and pools SUM(num)/SUM(den) over the offset window 2024-2025.
expected_query: with "tb174774c7624eae6a5465f76aeb3601a" as materialized (select "nfl_plays"."off" as "nfl_team", SUM(CASE WHEN successful_play = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as team_success_rate_from_plays_numerator, COUNT(*) as team_success_rate_from_plays_denominator, "nfl_plays"."year", "nfl_plays"."week" from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2024, 2025) group by "nfl_plays"."off", "nfl_plays"."year", "nfl_plays"."week"), "tb174774c7624eae6a5465f76aeb3601a_player_team_stats" as materialized (select "player_gamelogs"."pid", sum(tb174774c7624eae6a5465f76aeb3601a.team_success_rate_from_plays_numerator) as team_success_rate_from_plays_numerator, sum(tb174774c7624eae6a5465f76aeb3601a.team_success_rate_from_plays_denominator) as team_success_rate_from_plays_denominator from "player_gamelogs" inner join "nfl_games" on "player_gamelogs"."esbid" = "nfl_games"."esbid" inner join "tb174774c7624eae6a5465f76aeb3601a" on "player_gamelogs"."tm" = "tb174774c7624eae6a5465f76aeb3601a"."nfl_team" and "nfl_games"."year" = "tb174774c7624eae6a5465f76aeb3601a"."year" and "nfl_games"."week" = "tb174774c7624eae6a5465f76aeb3601a"."week" where "nfl_games"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."year" in (2024, 2025) and "player_gamelogs"."year" in (2024, 2025) group by "player_gamelogs"."pid") select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, (SELECT SUM(tb174774c7624eae6a5465f76aeb3601a_player_team_stats.team_success_rate_from_plays_numerator) / NULLIF(SUM(tb174774c7624eae6a5465f76aeb3601a_player_team_stats.team_success_rate_from_plays_denominator), 0) FROM tb174774c7624eae6a5465f76aeb3601a_player_team_stats WHERE tb174774c7624eae6a5465f76aeb3601a_player_team_stats.pid = player.pid) AS "team_success_rate_from_plays_0", "player"."pos" from "player" group by player.fname, player.lname, "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by "player"."pid" asc limit 500
